name: Sour Cream Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Mix all ingredients together except for cornflakes and butter in a large bowl.
3. Place the mixture in a casserole dish.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.
5. Remove from the oven.
6. Top with crushed Cornflakes and margarine or butter.
7. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
